title: When Nalla Stopped Drinking Water
ig_caption:
August heatwave. Nalla stopped drinking water for 3 days. The vet said: "freeze her treats."

Easier said than done — every store-bought "frozen dog treat" is 30-40% sugar, even the "natural" ones. So I made our own:

🫐 1 cup blueberries
🥛 1 cup plain Greek yogurt (no vanilla, no sweetener)
🍯 1 tsp honey (optional)

Blend → ice cube tray → freezer. 10 min work, 30 min to freeze. She inhaled them.

Now I make a tray every Sunday from May through September.

Save this 🔖 — your future-heatwave-self will thank you.

Full recipe + amounts: link in bio

👉 What's your hot-day routine for your pup?

#frozentreats #dogtreats #summerdog #petparent #nallasdad #dogfoodandfun
